nasb.text: Then Moses assembled all the congregation of the sons of Israel, and said to them, “These are the things that the Lord has commanded you to do:

esv.text: Moses assembled all the congregation of the people of Israel and said to them, “These are the things that the Lord has commanded you to do.

cnv.text: 摩西召集了以色列全體會眾，對他們說：“這就是耶和華吩咐的話，要你們遵行。

ccb.text: 摩西招聚以色列全体会众，对他们宣布说：“以下是耶和华吩咐你们遵守的事。
